title: About Me
text:
➡️ Hello! My name is Gavin Rowland and I am a 3rd-year Data Science student at UNC-Chapel Hill. I am passionate about using machine learning and data science to optimize algorithms for business operations. During my time at UNC I’ve completed courses in optimization, machine learning, and data analysis. Outside of class, I enjoy reading, hiking, and camping.
